# Honcho Hunters

> Confidential executive search and leadership intelligence platform connecting organisations with proven senior leaders across Defence, Global Capability Centres (GCC), Healthcare, Consumer Electronics, Steel, and Cement industries in India.

Honcho Hunters is a C-Suite Talent Management Consulting initiative, founded on the leadership and consulting legacy of Anil Mahajane (IIFT MBA, 1984), an operator with over 30 years of CEO and senior leadership experience across diverse industries. The platform does not operate as a public CV marketplace. It builds confidential, sector-specialised leadership networks and evaluates candidates on leadership maturity and strategic fit, not keyword-matched resumes.

## Practice Areas

- [Defence & Strategic Industries](https://honchohunters.com/defence/): Executive search for India's defence, aerospace and strategic manufacturing ecosystem — CEOs, defence business heads, aerospace leaders, manufacturing heads, technology leaders, programme directors and government-relations executives.
- [Global Capability Centres (GCC)](https://honchohunters.com/gcc/): Leaders who build, scale and transform GCCs from delivery centres into strategic innovation hubs — Centre Heads, Country Heads, GCC CEOs, engineering, product and business-function leadership.
- [Healthcare & Hospitals](https://honchohunters.com/healthcare/): Leadership for hospitals, healthcare enterprises and health-tech organisations — Hospital CEOs, Managing Directors, Medical Directors, clinical operations heads and digital health leaders.
- [Consumer Electronics & Technology](https://honchohunters.com/consumer-electronics/): Leadership for consumer technology, devices and manufacturing organisations — CXOs, business leaders, product leaders and manufacturing leadership.
- [Steel Industry](https://honchohunters.com/steel/): Industrial leadership for steel and metals — CEOs, plant heads, technical/engineering and commercial leadership driving scale and transformation.
- [Cement Industry](https://honchohunters.com/cement/): Leadership for cement and infrastructure organisations — CEOs, plant heads, technical and commercial leadership driving efficiency and sustainable growth.

## For Senior Professionals

Senior leaders exploring CXO, business leadership, advisory or board-level opportunities in any of the above sectors can confidentially share their profile at [honchohunters.com/engage/](https://honchohunters.com/engage/). Profiles are never published publicly and are shared only against relevant mandates.

## For Organisations

Organisations with a leadership mandate to share can reach Honcho Hunters at leadership@honchohunters.com.

## About

[honchohunters.com/about/](https://honchohunters.com/about/) — background on the founder, Anil Mahajane, and the C-Suite Talent Management Consulting initiative behind Honcho Hunters.
